raw_prompt: the checkout page is slow, make it faster

clarify.question:
Which checkout page performance issue should I focus on?

A) Frontend rendering / JavaScript performance
B) Backend API response times
C) Database queries or N+1 problems
D) Asset loading (images, bundles, etc.)
E) Unsure — analyze the full checkout flow

Also: Do you have performance metrics or profiling data (load time, bottleneck)? If not, I'll audit the full checkout flow.
clarify.memory_record: User wants checkout page performance improved but didn't specify frontend vs backend bottleneck; needs clarification on which layer to optimize.

answer: checkout p95 is ~3s; api/checkout.py runs an N+1 DB query per line item. don't change the public API or behavior, and add a regression/benchmark test.

rewrite.memory_record: User wants to optimize api/checkout.py N+1 query issue (p95 latency ~3s) without changing public API; regression test required.
rewrite.downstream_prompt:
Fix N+1 database queries in api/checkout.py that are causing checkout p95 latency ~3s. Optimize queries to fetch line item relationships efficiently (e.g., use select_related or prefetch_related). Do not change the public API signature or checkout behavior. Add a regression/benchmark test to prevent future N+1 regressions.
